tasks.subject: Batch2-Task 1: 边界规则强化(格子形状 + 反向断言 + WalletProps 归位)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 补上第一批终审移交的两条断言并把根包散类 WalletProps 归位。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/WalletProps.kt
- Modify: GabonApplication.kt(删 WalletProps)、ModuleBoundaryTest.kt(+2 测试)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 格子形状断言 + 负向探针红/绿证据
- TABLE_OWNER 反向断言 + 假条目探针红/绿证据
- WalletProps 归位 wallet.internal
- ./gradlew check 全绿 16 测试

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/WalletProps.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/GabonApplication.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shape assertion with red probe evidence", "stale entry assertion with red probe evidence", "WalletProps relocated", "16 tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch2-Task 2: V2__identity_core.sql + 表归属登记 + truncate 列表
tasks.description:
**Goal:** identity 三表 DDL 落地,codegen 重新生成,TABLE_OWNER 登记(internal 前缀),truncate 列表补全。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/resources/db/migration/V2__identity_core.sql
- Modify: ModuleBoundaryTest.kt(TABLE_OWNER +3 → com.gabon.identity.internal)、AbstractPgTest.kt(truncate +3 表)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 三表结构与 spec §5.1 一致
- 不变量落 DB:status/principal_type CHECK、octet_length(token_hash)=32、TOTP 密材与 key_version 同生同灭、key_version>0、last_used_step≥0
- TDD:先红(三表未登记)后绿,证据留报告
- ./gradlew check 全绿 16 测试

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["src/main/resources/db/migration/V2__identity_core.sql", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractPgTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DDL matches spec 5.1", "invariants as CHECK constraints", "completeness assertion red then green with evidence", "internal prefix registration", "16 tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch2-Task 3: AbstractIntegrationTest(PG+Valkey)+ CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 测试基类改名 + Valkey 单例容器,CLAUDE.md 同步;main 与 build.gradle.kts 零改动。

**Files:**
- Rename+Modify: AbstractPgTest.kt → AbstractIntegrationTest.kt
- Modify: 4 个子类基类名、CLAUDE.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Valkey tag docker pull 核实;redis 属性名对照 Boot 4.1 文档核实
- grep AbstractPgTest 零命中;不加 Redis 客户端依赖
- ./gradlew check 全绿 16 测试

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valkey tag verified", "redis property names verified against Boot 4.1 docs", "no main code or build changes", "16 tests green"]}
```
